title: bridge-matrix: bot detection broken when homeserver URL port differs from emitted MXID
description: bridge-matrix/src/bridge.rs is_bot_sender: strips http(s):// and trailing slash from homeserver URL then builds '@{bot_localpart}:{domain}'. If homeserver is configured as 'https://matrix.example.com' but server emits MXIDs as '@niebridge:matrix.example.com:443', the comparison fails and echo-loop suppression breaks — every message the bridge posts to Matrix is forwarded back to nie, creating an infinite loop. Trigger: non-default port on homeserver URL vs default port in emitted MXIDs.
